data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,200 USDT with a Narrowed 3.47% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 01, 2025, 11:04 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,200 USDT and is now trading at 2,195.72998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.47% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 85,000 USDT with a Narrowed 6.04% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 01, 2025, 10:52 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 85,000 USDT and is now trading at 84,919.203125 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 6.04% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Network Experiences Extended Block Interval
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from mempool indicates that Bitcoin's latest block, numbered 885840, was mined at 18:30:14 UTC+8 on March 1. This marks an interval of over 77 minutes since the previous block, 885839, which was mined at 17:13:00 UTC+8.

data.title: Synthetix founder comments on EF Silviculture Society: Ethereum Foundation needs a CMO to improve communication with the community
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Kain Warwick, founder of Synthetix and Infinex, commented on the launch of the EF Silviculture Society by the Ethereum Foundation: "Ironically, I like several of the members very much, so I think this is a good thing. But the communication around this initiative is very disconnected, which also shows why we need a CMO to help the Ethereum Foundation improve communication with the community." Earlier, the Ethereum Foundation announced the launch of the informal advisory group EF Silviculture Society on the X platform. The members are all from external individuals, aiming to provide informal advice to the Ethereum Foundation EF to ensure that the core values ​​of open source, privacy, security and resistance to censorship are maintained.

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees Significant Net Inflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 1, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $94.3 million into U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs. The breakdown of the inflows and outflows is as follows:BlackRock's IBIT experienced an outflow of $244 million, while Fidelity's FBTC saw an inflow of $176 million. Bitwise's BITB recorded an inflow of $4.6 million, and ARK's ARKB had a significant inflow of $193.7 million. VanEck's HODL faced an outflow of $7.7 million. Grayscale's GBTC saw an outflow of $33.3 million, whereas Grayscale Mini BTC recorded an inflow of $5.6 million.

data.title: Solana Memecoin Daily Issuance Hits Lowest Level Since December 2024
data.description: According to Foresight News, Cointelegraph reports that data from Solscan indicates a significant decline in the daily issuance of memecoins on the Solana blockchain. The issuance has dropped to 40,000, marking the lowest level since December 25, 2024.

data.title: Microsoft to Discontinue Skype in 2025, Focus on Microsoft Teams
data.description: According to PANews, Microsoft announced on February 28, 2025, that it will discontinue Skype by May 2025 to streamline its communication products and better meet customer needs. During the transition period, users can migrate to Microsoft Teams for free. Microsoft Teams users will be able to communicate with Skype users, and vice versa. Additionally, Skype users will have the option to export their data during this period. Skype will continue to operate until May 5, 2025.

data.title: Trump Company Files Trademark for Metaverse and NFT Marketplace
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, DTTM Operations, a company owned by U.S. President Donald Trump, filed for trademarks on February 24 for the word 'TRUMP' in connection with a metaverse and NFT marketplace centered around the President's brand. This virtual world would allow users to shop for both physical and virtual goods, dine in a Trump-themed restaurant, and experience simulated transport via limousine, aircraft, train, and automobile. Additionally, users could watch public service programs addressing social issues, current events, and fundraising efforts.The proposed Trump metaverse would also offer virtual training services, personal coaching, and guided tours of hotels and public and government buildings. An NFT marketplace is also planned, with the stipulation that only content approved by the President would be allowed. The filing describes hosting software platforms for virtual reality-based worlds where users can exchange digital goods and cryptocurrencies, using only images, texts, videos, and sound files authorized by the 45th and 47th President of the United States and authenticated by non-fungible tokens (NFTs).Trademark Attorney Josh Gerben noted that the filing was made on an 'intent to use' basis, indicating future commercial activity under the Trump brand. Interest in the metaverse has declined since its peak in late 2021, following Facebook's rebranding to Meta. Google Trends data shows that searches for the term 'metaverse' have decreased significantly since then. Similarly, NFTs have not regained the popularity they experienced during the 2021-2022 bull run, with many collections seeing reduced prices.President Trump and his family have been active in the crypto space, with ventures into related technologies. Between his presidencies, Trump launched a series of NFT collections and sought to attract the crypto vote. At a Bitcoin Conference in Nashville in July 2024, he pledged to make America the crypto capital of the world and promised to dismiss Gary Gensler on his first day in office. On January 17, 2025, just days before taking office, Trump introduced his official memecoin, causing a stir in the crypto community. First Lady Melania Trump later launched her own memecoin.Other Trump family members have also engaged in crypto activities. Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. were involved in forming World Liberty Financial, a decentralized finance platform, with the aim to 'make finance great again.' Despite being recognized as the U.S.'s first 'Crypto President,' Trump has faced criticism for shifting from a strategic Bitcoin reserve to a 'digital asset stockpile' and for market instability amid trade wars and economic uncertainty.

data.title: Eason Technology Allocates $150,000 For Bitcoin Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, Eason Technology, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, has announced its decision to invest $150,000 in Bitcoin. The company's CEO clarified that this purchase is intended for product development purposes. Currently, there are no plans to incorporate digital assets into the company's asset portfolio.

data.title: DeepSeek Unveils Key Insights Into V3/R1 Inference System
data.description: According to Foresight News, DeepSeek has released an article titled 'Overview of the DeepSeek-V3/R1 Inference System,' revealing crucial details about the V3/R1 inference system. The article discloses significant information regarding DeepSeek's theoretical costs and profit margins. Assuming a GPU rental cost of $2 per hour, the total daily cost amounts to $87,072. If all tokens are priced according to DeepSeek R1's rates, the theoretical daily revenue could reach $562,027, resulting in a cost-profit margin of 545%.
